notes.title: Useful TS snippets
notes.content:
// Type-safe object keys
const keys = <T extends object>(o: T) => Object.keys(o) as Array<keyof T>;

// Branded primitive
type UserId = string & { __brand: 'UserId' };

notes.title: Mom's Rajma Recipe
notes.content:
Soak rajma overnight. Pressure cook with salt + bay leaf, 6 whistles.

Saute onion+ginger+garlic, add tomato puree, cumin, coriander, garam masala, kasuri methi. Add cooked rajma + reserved water. Simmer 20 min.

Serve with jeera rice and onion rings.

insurancePolicies.claimProcess: 1. Call 1800-425-2255 cashless intimation. 2. Submit at any network hospital — Apollo / Manipal / Fortis covered. 3. For reimbursement: file claim within 30 days with bills + discharge summary.
insurancePolicies.notes: Family floater — covers self + spouse. Auto-renew enabled. Lifetime renewal guarantee.

insurancePolicies.claimProcess: Death claim: spouse to submit claim form D + original policy + death certificate + KYC at any LIC branch. Maturity: lifetime payouts continue till age 100.
insurancePolicies.notes: Whole-life endowment. 8% guaranteed bonus on sum assured annually from year 5. Premium paying period: 30 years (ends 2048).

insurancePolicies.claimProcess: Toll-free 1800-2666 for cashless claim at network garages. App: HDFC Ergo Insurance. Self-survey for damages < ₹50,000.
insurancePolicies.notes: Comprehensive cover with zero-dep add-on. NCB 35%. Hyundai Creta 2024, registration KA-01-MJ-4471.

insurancePolicies.claimProcess: WhatsApp +91 7738282525 for trip-cancellation / lost-luggage / medical emergency. 24/7 support overseas.
insurancePolicies.notes: Multi-trip cover, USD 50K medical. Includes COVID-19. Used for Goa + Singapore trips in 2026.

insurancePolicies.claimProcess: Nominee to call 1860-120-5577 within 30 days. Submit claim form + death cert + KYC + last 3 months bank statement. Settlement within 30 days for clean claims.
insurancePolicies.notes: Pure term cover, ₹2 crore SA till age 65. Accidental death rider +₹50L. No maturity benefit.
